title: ficus populnea f. botryapioides
intro: Ficus populnea f. botryapioides, also known as the Banyan Fig, is a variant of the Ficus populnea tree species, characterized by its unique and compact growth habit. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus populnea f. botryapioides include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
